headline: Huntington Ingalls Benefits From Strong Naval Shipbuilding Demand
summary: HII's naval shipbuilding strength, $54B backlog and unmanned systems push support growth despite supplier and cost challenges.

headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 gap up and gap down stocks
